title: Dialog component for confirming file linking and navigation
purpose: Provides a modal dialog that asks users to confirm linking an unlinked source file and navigating to a target location, used in cross-file navigation and global search features.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named LinkAndNavigateDialog that accepts props for controlling visibility, handling user actions, and displaying candidate file information. Includes a helper function basename for extracting filenames from paths.

steps.content: Split the input path string by forward slashes.
Return the last element of the split array as the filename.
IF the split results in an empty array, return the original path string.
Initialize internal state for processing status and error messages.
Set up a keyboard event listener to close the dialog on escape key press.
Reset internal state when the dialog opens.
Define a callback function to handle confirmation actions.
IF the dialog is not open or no candidate is provided, return null.
Extract the filename and line information from the candidate.
Render the dialog UI with header, body, and footer sections.
Display the file linking confirmation message and source path.
IF already processing, return early to prevent duplicate actions.
Set the processing state to true and clear any previous error messages.
Attempt to execute the parent-provided confirmation function.
IF the confirmation succeeds, allow the parent component to handle closing.
IF the confirmation fails, capture the error and reset processing state.
